decontamination_notes: Original scenario written for VulcanBench on 2026-06-28 for the carbyne tier; the house code and rubric are not derived from any existing repository, so they post-date all model training cutoffs.

blocking: unique_by keeps the FIRST item encountered for each distinct key(item) and returns them in input order. (A {key(i): i for i in items} comprehension keeps the LAST item per key, which is wrong here.)
The change modifies only the module and adds no dependency.

weighted.criterion: It tracks seen keys while iterating and appends the first item per key, rather than building a dict that overwrites earlier items with later ones.
